author: Ragna
description: Propsync is an Obsidian plugin that syncs standard properties across notes by group. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ragna
manifest.description: Sync standard properties across notes by group without overwriting existing values.
manifest.name: Propsync

name: Propsync
